user.title: Connect to NED Energy
user.description:
Enter your NED API key. You can request one at https://ned.nl.

Update interval: how often sensors are refreshed (seconds). Min: {min_interval}s, max: {max_interval}s, default: {default_interval}s.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate NED Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Your NED API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new one.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key — please check and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the NED API. Please check your network and try again.

init.title: NED Energy Options
init.description: Adjust how often sensors are refreshed. Min: {min_interval}s, max: {max_interval}s.
